query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events
| where _sourceCategory in ("accessKeys", "saml", "serviceAllowlist", "passwordPolicy", "multiFactorAuthentication")
| _sourceCategory as EventType
| json "eventName", "operator.email" as EventName, UserEmail nodrop
| Count as Count by UserEmail, EventType
| transpose row UserEmail column EventType as %"accessKeys", %"saml", %"serviceAllowlist", %"passwordPolicy", %"multiFactorAuthentication"
| sort by accessKeys, saml, serviceAllowlist, passwordPolicy, multiFactorAuthentication
| limit 5

sources.dashboardDescription: Security Management - Overview Dashboard provides an at-a-glance view of security activities over time, user activity, the number of users who have been enabled and disabled MFA, and the geographic locations of security activities.
